name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.SFTPEventSource
description: SFTPEventSource describes an event-source for sftp related events.

eventType.name:
Type of file operations to watch
Refer https://github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify/blob/master/fsnotify.go for more information

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

password.description: Password required for authentication if any.

pollIntervalDuration.name:
PollIntervalDuration the interval at which to poll the SFTP server
defaults to 10 seconds
+optional

sshKeySecret.description: SSHKeySecret refers to the secret that contains SSH key. Key needs to contain private key and public key.

username.description: Username required for authentication if any.

watchPathConfig.name: WatchPathConfig contains configuration about the file path to watch
